justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "next Thursday" as June 11th, but correctly identified June 4th after the user's clarification.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots on the same day after the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, requiring only one clarification from the user to proceed with booking.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly adapting to the user's clarified time preference.
